user.title: Set up VibeDash
user.description: Select the AI Task provider to use for generating dashboards.

streaming.title: Streaming (Optional)
streaming.description: Optionally configure a direct LLM connection for real-time streaming responses. If skipped, VibeDash uses the AI Task provider above (non-streaming).

abort.no_ai_task: No AI Task integrations found. Please set up an AI Task provider first.

error.streaming_validation_failed: Could not connect to streaming provider: {error_detail}

init.title: VibeDash Options
init.description: Change the AI Task provider used for generating dashboards.

streaming.title: Streaming Configuration
streaming.description: Configure a direct LLM connection for real-time streaming responses. Select 'None' to disable streaming and use the AI Task provider instead.
